# Correct: convert the list to a set for O(1) constant time membership lookups
FORBIDDEN_WORDS = {"spam", "buy", "crypto", "click", "free", "viagra"}

def filter_messages(messages):
    clean = []
    for msg in messages:
        if not any(word in FORBIDDEN_WORDS for word in msg.split()):
            clean.append(msg)
    return clean
